title: Grand Prix in Monaco | Mas du Chanoine
description: Grand Prix in Monaco: French Riviera event near our guesthouse.
paragraphs: Since 1954, the Monaco Grand Prix is organized on the last weekend of May. The 3.7 km circuit designed in 1929 meanders in the city of Monaco, Condamine and Port Hercule: tight turns, dream views, spectators can see the cars turning 78 times before the finish line. The F1 Grand Prix is very popular: motorsport fans from all over the world come to the French Riviera.
